steps.title: Use shared and unshared vocabulary
steps.content: Shared botanical vocabulary points to descent from a common older language. But maize vocabulary is not shared across the northern and southern branches, even though maize was eventually cultivated by both.

steps.title: Infer the timing of maize adoption
steps.content: If maize had been acquired before the branch split, inherited maize terms would likely be shared. A predicts direct transfer that would make shared vocabulary more likely. B shifts to cultivation methods, and C conflicts with the northward diffusion timeline. The answer is D.
